title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Himalaya Drug Company Global Group are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Mysuru. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Himalaya Drug Company Global Group:
Himalaya Drug Company Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company Global Group!
